seo.title: Naanagiya Nadhimoolame Lyrics Vishwaroopam 2
seo.description: Full Naanaagiya Nadhimoolamae songs lyrics, Vishwaroopam 2 Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: M Ghibran, Singer(s): Kamal Haasan.
seo.keywords: Vishwaroopam 2, M Ghibran, Kamal Haasan, Naanaagiya Nadhimoolamae full lyrics, Vishwaroopam 2 songs lyrics, Naanaagiya Nadhimoolamae lyrics snippets, Naanaagiya Nadhimoolamae WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Naanaagiya Nadhimoolamae lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Naanagiya Nadhimoolame expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

How does this song fit into the plot of Vishwaroopam 2?

The song captures a significant emotional moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's inner struggles and connections.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Kamal Haasan and composed by M Ghibran.

When was the song released?

Naanagiya Nadhimoolame was released on July 1, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naanagiya Nadhimoolame, Kamal Haasan's soulful rendition evokes a profound sense of love and yearning. The song serves as a poignant reflection of the protagonist's emotional journey in Vishwaroopam 2. With its rich lyrical content and M Ghibran's captivating music, it beautifully conveys the struggles of love and connection. This melody resonates deeply, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naanagiya Nadhimoolame from Vishwaroopam 2 is a soul-stirring melody that showcases Kamal Haasan's captivating vocals. With M Ghibran's enchanting composition, this song beautifully blends emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema. Experience the depth of love and longing through its poignant lyrics and mesmerizing tune.
stanzaMeanings: I am the root of existence, the foundation of life that supports me, there is no escape from this situation.
I think of you every day (2)
Like you, my life is also a woman, and I am also a mother.
You are the great journey I was born into, the great greatness that has been realized.
I think of you every day (2)
I think of you every day (2)
I searched for the essence of truth in the world, I see the old things with new eyes.
Will the old memories return, will the day come when I can rest in the past?
pa ni sa ga ga ri sa ni ni pa ma ga pa ni sa ga ri pa sa ni sa ni
